title: Brick By Brick, Suck My...
description:
A MAN HAS FARTED INTO THE JUKEBOX IN LEGO ISLAND!
Enjoy my unnecessarily explicit edit of a classic song from a classic game which was a staple of my childhood.  As Stefán Karl would say,  "DON'T LET YOUR KIDS WATCH IT!"

Special thanks / Links:
- High-quality recordings of LEGO Island music restored from cassette tape:  https://projectisland.org/music/
- The inspiration behind this nonsense, plus a reaction from the original songwriters: https://youtube.com/watch?v=KT3jmWI08uw
- Vinesauce Joel's metal cover of Brick By Brick:  https://youtube.com/watch?v=zBwJZitSBx0

Also, happy 25th anniversary to LEGO Island! 🥳
